calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Continued To Dec-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Quiet Title - Real Property Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title-Real Property Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Joel Yodowitz, Esq. for Plaintiff: United States Postal Service.
Plaintiff's Witness: elana Alejandre, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: ALL PERSONS, quieting the tiltle to all the real property fully described in EXHIBIT-A, attached to the Judgment, See scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
